title: 10 best herbal teas for baldness
description: Turmeric teas helps with baldness because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The curcumin present in turmeric has been shown to promote hair growth by stimulating blood flow to the scalp, reducing oxidative stress, and combating inflammation that can cause hair loss. Additionally, turmeric's antimicrobial properties help to keep the scalp healthy and free from fungal infections that can contribute to baldness.
